No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to ending hunger.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a university-level foreign language course, directly providing tertiary education (Target 4.3). It also fosters relevant skills (Target 4.4) and promotes appreciation of cultural diversity (Target 4.7) through cultural introductions.
evidence: 協助學生認識西班牙與拉丁美洲的社會文化
培育學生的西班牙語聽、說、讀、寫之能力

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly includes content on 'professions and their main tasks' ('談論職業及其主要工作'), which provides skills relevant for employment and decent work (Targets 8.3, 8.5).
evidence: Hablar de profesiones y sus principales labores

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course's objective to 'assist students in understanding Spanish and Latin American social culture' ('協助學生認識西班牙與拉丁美洲的社會文化') indirectly promotes social inclusion and reduces inequalities through cross-cultural understanding (Target 10.2).
evidence: 協助學生認識西班牙與拉丁美洲的社會文化

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Introducing 'Spanish and Latin American culture' ('介紹西班牙與中南美洲各國社會與文化') can weakly contribute to appreciating and safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).
evidence: 介紹西班牙與中南美洲各國社會與文化

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to responsible consumption and production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to peace, justice, or strong institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course aims to 'enhance Spanish conversation ability, able to communicate daily with native Spanish speakers' ('能夠與西語母語人士進行日常溝通'), which develops essential communication skills for global partnerships and knowledge sharing (Targets 17.6, 17.16).
evidence: 能夠與西語母語人士進行日常溝通
